name: S1-Omni: A Unified Multimodal Reasoning Model for Scientific Understanding, Prediction, and Generation

description: arXiv:2607.15686v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present S1-Omni, a unified multimodal reasoning model for scientific understanding, prediction, and generation. AI for Science (AI4S) has advanced significantly through domain-specific models, tool-augmented LLMs, and scientific language models. However, model capabilities remain highly fragmented, limiting the joint modeling of heterogeneous d...
